description.zh: 无声击杀永远是最有效的手段，当然，你得保持一个安全距离。神枪手安排的下一个任务可就是真的难题了。你需要装上消音器，然后在中距离狙杀一些老练的敌人。
description.en: Neutralizing your target is more effective without any noise, from a safe distance. The next test from Sniper is a practice in this kind of business. Get a suppressor and shoot experienced enemies from medium distances.
